heroDescription: IT Ant ehf is an Icelandic IT consultancy. We advise, build and run dependable technology for businesses — pragmatic engineering without the overhead of a big agency.

lineage.intro: We build our own products, too.
lineage.body: IT Ant is the parent of the ANTS family and the company behind G9, a product house — and ultimately CertainGuard. The same hands that consult for you also ship real software.

seo.title: IT Ant ehf — Your IT consultAnt | itant.is
seo.description: IT Ant ehf is an Icelandic IT consultancy: IT advisory, software & web development, cloud & Azure, security and automation. Small team, heavy lifting.
